entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/dashy · May 15, 2026 13:39
[BUG] Todoist widget stuck loading - Todoist REST API v2 deprecated, migrated to API v1 #2023
The Todoist widget is broken / stuck loading since Todoist migrated their API from REST v2 to API v1. The old endpoint api.todoist.com/rest/v2/ now…
